title: I need help setting up my account to assign leads from x cities to x Account Executive?
excerpt: If theres a manual or automated way to do this please let me know. I don’t want all my leads accessed by every AE. I want to only allow access to their assigned territories.

posts.author: explorevala (Donald Kernan)
posts.cookedHtml: If theres a manual or automated way to do this please let me know. I don’t want all my leads accessed by every AE. I want to only allow access to their assigned territories.

posts.author: Leandre_R (Léandre @LaBriqueJaune)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @explorevala,

How about having a board per city, so you can give access to these boards to specific AEs?

I’m waiting to hear from you,

Léandre

posts.author: explorevala (Donald Kernan)
posts.cookedHtml: I honestly did this already, I have the boards up per city. I guess my question is once I have a new AE as a user. How do I designate the boards to them? This way they can’t have access to all boards. @Leandre_R

posts.author: Leandre_R (Léandre @LaBriqueJaune)
posts.cookedHtml:
So you already have these boards up for each city. How about making these boards private? So when you have a new AE, they can request permission to view the board that matches their territory.

Capture d’écran 2024-01-06 à 22.32.581920×920 91.6 KB

three dots → board settings → change board type

posts.author: explorevala (Donald Kernan)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you need a special version of Monday to do this? I have the regular version and I don’t see this option?

posts.author: explorevala (Donald Kernan)
posts.cookedHtml: Never mind yes, I see it now. I have to have Pro ok thank you
